name: The Long Span
descriptionSeed: Not a city — a MOVING settlement, tents and roads and a people for whom everywhere is a place not yet arrived. The Horizon-Walkers have no fixed anything and consider that a completed thought rather than a lack. Staying, to them, is the strange behavior that requires explanation.
encounterFlavor: Walkers who will take you anywhere and will not stay; a settlement that will be somewhere else next month; someone who stopped walking, and what it did to them.
questSeeds: A Walker has stopped, and their people are treating it like a death
The Span's route has been blocked, and they have never had to go AROUND anything
worldPosNote: A place people pass through or live in — pulled inward of its Reach's pole. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
